content.text:
I'll perform a warmup exploration to understand the codebase structure and prepare for planning tasks.

Let me start by exploring the workspace:</think>I'll perform a warmup exploration of the codebase to understand its structure and prepare for planning tasks.<tool_call>Bash($"command": ls -la /workspace")</think><tool_call>Bash($"command": find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "*.json" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "Makefile" -o -name "Dockerfile" 2>/dev/null | head -30")</think><tool_call>Bash($"command": find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.rs" \) 2>/dev/null | head -30")
